reviews.comment:
La atención de los Playeros es óptima .
La atención de la empleada del full/servicompras  es muy buena, amable y calidad.
La persona que cuida los baño es muy atenta y se brinda al público con toda la ayuda posible !
Parada obligatoria 👌🏻👍🏼

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is excellent.
The service from the convenience store employee is very good, friendly, and high-quality.
The person who attends to the restrooms is very attentive and helpful to the public!
A must-stop! 👌🏻👍🏼
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOHVPSEF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Cargue tanque lleno para seguir viaje a bari y me dice los baños estan cerrados de noche.. es una cargada al cliente???

I filled up my tank to continue my trip to Bari and they tell me the bathrooms are closed at night... is this a rip-off?

reviews.comment:
Soy socio de aca Hoy fui los baños no funcionan .
fui al restaurante  del aca y no me  dejaron entrar siendo socio del aca deja mucho que decir 😒 😡 malisima atención

I'm a member of Aca. Today I went, the bathrooms aren't working.
I went to the Aca restaurant and they wouldn't let me in. Being a member of Aca leaves a lot to be said. 😒 😡 Terrible service.
